name: asia_london_range_expansion_xauusd_v1
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the London session (07:00-10:00 UTC) breaks the Asia range (00:00-06:00 UTC) with follow-through when the Asia range is between 0.5x and 2.0x ATR(14). A true-breakout entry (close beyond range by >=0.5 ATR) will produce >=200 trades over 4.5y and positive expectancy.

entry_rules.long: During london window, close > asia_range_high + 0.5*ATR AND candle_body >= 1.0*ATR AND only first breakout of day
entry_rules.short: During london window, close < asia_range_low - 0.5*ATR AND candle_body >= 1.0*ATR AND only first breakout of day

regime_filter.description: Avoid dead and blow-off volatility days only.

exit_rules.stop_loss: 0.75 * ATR(14) from entry (below range for long, above for short)
exit_rules.time_stop: close at 15:00 UTC (end of London/NY overlap) if neither hit
exit_rules.trailing: move to breakeven after +1.0 ATR in favor
